name: Paul Parker | LEXINGTON & CONCORD
description:
MINUTEMAN OC!!! takes place towards the end of the fight at Concord, where you and the other Minutemen are trying to find the last Redcoat who for some reason didn’t retreat with the rest.

(oh my god i just realized this description is outdated. he’s banging at your door to prepare, not trying to find the last redcoat.)
